channel.title: SeatGeek on Emerald City Gear
channel.description: Recent content in SeatGeek on Emerald City Gear

item.title: Seattle Mariners Opening Day 2026: Everything You Need to Be Ready
item.description:
Opening Day is Thursday, March 26. The Mariners host the Cleveland Guardians at T-Mobile Park, and it’s not just another home opener — 2026 marks the franchise’s 50th anniversary season. There’s extra weight to this one.

Whether you’re going to the park, watching from home, or shopping for gear to mark the occasion, here’s everything you need.

The Game

Who: Seattle Mariners vs. Cleveland Guardians When: Thursday, March 26, 2026 Where: T-Mobile Park, Seattle

item.title: Best Seats at T-Mobile Park: A Section-by-Section Guide
item.description:
T-Mobile Park is one of the better baseball stadiums in the American League. Good sightlines, a retractable roof that actually gets used, and a layout that doesn’t punish you for not spending $200 on a ticket. But the sections are not all created equal — there’s a big difference between “solid lower bowl seat for $35” and “overpriced corner seat where you’re watching the game at a 45-degree angle.”

I’ve sat in probably 40 different sections at T-Mobile Park over the years. Here’s the honest breakdown of where to sit, what to expect, and how to find a deal.
